title: Crafting Manipulator
description: Library mod for fabric that lets you modify crafting results and more
body:
## Crafting Manipulator is used to modify crafting results (+ few other things)

It was designed for **Hammers and Smithing** (to make items uncraftable when player doesn't stand near Smithing Table)



[About usage](https://github.com/Xires87/CraftingManipulator)



**This mod doesn't do anything on it's own. Install it when other mod depends on it.**
